description: Triggers when the user wants to create, optimize, or analyze a referral program, affiliate program, or word-of-mouth growth strategy
should_trigger: Design a referral program for my B2B SaaS with double-sided rewards
How do I set up an affiliate program for content creators to promote my tool?
My product has low referral rate — what can I do to get customers to share more?
Create a refer-a-friend program with tiered rewards to gamify referrals
What incentive structure works best for a word-of-mouth program in B2C?
How do I measure referral program ROI and track attributed customers?
Build a viral loop for my SaaS — users should invite their team naturally
should_not_trigger: Create an email drip campaign for new signups
How do I track UTM parameters in Google Analytics?
Set up an affiliate link in the footer
